name: real-estate-broker
description: Real estate broker toolkit for Qobrix CRM and WhatsApp (WaSender). Manage listings, leads, viewings, follow-ups, and send property selections to clients — all from Claude Code.

qobrix_api_url.description: Your Qobrix CRM instance URL (e.g. https://yourcompany.eu1.qobrix.com)

qobrix_api_user.description: Your Qobrix API User ID (UUID shown when generating the API key)

wasender_api_key.description: Your WaSender API key (from wasenderapi.com dashboard)
